name: Ruby Tomato Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the canned tomatoes and chop them. Reserve the liquid.
2. In a heavy saucepan or crockpot, combine all ingredients except for 1 cup of the tomato juice.
3. Simmer covered for half an hour.
4. Stir the mixture, then continue to simmer over low heat for another hour until the liquid evaporates and becomes very syrupy (depending on how watery the tomatoes were).
5. As the chutney finishes cooking, the tomatoes will become translucent and "ruby" colored.
6. Store in canning jars or freeze.
